29171.title: MTV Evolutions 2016 Highlights
29171.description: The Philippines plays host to MTV Evolution Manila, featuring epic performances from artists including One Republic, Bebe Rexha, Far East Movement, Apink, Gary V, James Reid and Nadine Lustre.
